summary: This document is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) outlining human resources processes for maintaining employee competence and regulatory compliance. It details employee role assignments, record-keeping requirements, training methodologies, and verification of training effectiveness. Specific sections address regulatory obligations for medical device consultants in Germany and the Person Responsible for Regulatory Compliance (PRRC) under EU regulations.
